englishDefinitions: the period of constant activity or running around had ended
persianTranslation: روزهای دویدن و شلوغی‌اش تمام شده بود
دوران پرتحرکش به پایان رسیده بود
examples: By then, his running days was over and he preferred quiet evenings.
After retirement, her running days was over.
For the old dog, running days was over.
